steps.title: Compare documentation levels
steps.content: The passage contrasts Wladyslaw I Herman, a later and better-documented ruler, with Lestek, whose historical actuality is disputed and whose record relies on oral tradition.

steps.title: Reject reversed claims
steps.content: Choice A reverses the evidence. Choice C reverses the timeline. Choice D wrongly says Wladyslaw's existence depends on similar oral stories. The stated contrast is accepted existence for Wladyslaw and disputed existence for Lestek. The answer is B.
